allow: PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\svrub\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-svrub-Documents-Mis-cosillas-ProyectosPersonales-brainybuddy\\416e11ac-d3a1-4c4c-9497-3863ea40e4eb\\tool-results\\mcp-render-list_logs-1776945928755.txt"; $data = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $idx = 0; $positions = @\(\); while \($idx -lt $data.Length\) { $found = $data.IndexOf\("flashcard", $idx, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase\); if \($found -lt 0\) { break }; $positions += $found; $idx = $found + 1 }; Write-Output "flashcard occurrences: $\($positions.Count\)"; Write-Output \("positions: " + \($positions -join ","\)\))

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\svrub\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-svrub-Documents-Mis-cosillas-ProyectosPersonales-brainybuddy\\416e11ac-d3a1-4c4c-9497-3863ea40e4eb\\tool-results\\mcp-render-list_logs-1776945928755.txt"; $data = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); function Locs\($s, $needle\) { $pos=@\(\); $i=0; while \(\($i = $s.IndexOf\($needle, $i, [System.StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase\)\) -ge 0\) { $pos += $i; $i++ }; $pos }; $tutor = Locs $data 'tutor'; Write-Output "tutor positions:"; Write-Output \($tutor -join ","\); $api = Locs $data '/api/'; Write-Output "/api/ positions:"; Write-Output \($api -join ","\))

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\svrub\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-svrub-Documents-Mis-cosillas-ProyectosPersonales-brainybuddy\\416e11ac-d3a1-4c4c-9497-3863ea40e4eb\\tool-results\\mcp-render-list_logs-1776945928755.txt"; $data = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $positions = 224367,225451,225945,226444,226938,227439,227938,228433,260863; foreach \($p in $positions\) { $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $p - 200\); $len = 500; if \($start + $len -gt $data.Length\) { $len = $data.Length - $start }; Write-Output "=== pos $p ==="; Write-Output $data.Substring\($start, $len\); Write-Output "" })

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\svrub\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-svrub-Documents-Mis-cosillas-ProyectosPersonales-brainybuddy\\416e11ac-d3a1-4c4c-9497-3863ea40e4eb\\tool-results\\mcp-render-list_logs-1776945928755.txt"; $data = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $positions = 228977,232953,234317,238293,239657,243633,244997,248973,250336,254312; foreach \($p in $positions\) { $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $p - 150\); $len = 400; if \($start + $len -gt $data.Length\) { $len = $data.Length - $start }; Write-Output "=== pos $p ==="; Write-Output $data.Substring\($start, $len\); Write-Output "" })

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\svrub\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-svrub-Documents-Mis-cosillas-ProyectosPersonales-brainybuddy\\416e11ac-d3a1-4c4c-9497-3863ea40e4eb\\tool-results\\mcp-render-list_logs-1776945928755.txt"; $data = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); function Count2\($s, $needle\) { $c=0; $i=0; while \(\($i = $s.IndexOf\($needle, $i, [System.StringComparison]::Ordinal\)\) -ge 0\) { $c++; $i++ }; $c }; $n1 = '\\"level\\": \\"ERROR\\"'; $n2 = '\\"level\\": \\"WARNING\\"'; $n3 = '\\"level\\": \\"INFO\\"'; $n4 = '\\"value\\":\\"error\\"'; $n5 = 'Unhandled exception'; Write-Output "'\\level\\: \\ERROR\\' count: $\(Count2 $data $n1\)"; Write-Output "'\\level\\: \\WARNING\\' count: $\(Count2 $data $n2\)"; Write-Output "'\\level\\: \\INFO\\' count: $\(Count2 $data $n3\)"; Write-Output "'value:error' count: $\(Count2 $data $n4\)"; Write-Output "'Unhandled exception' count: $\(Count2 $data $n5\)")

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\svrub\\.claude\\projects\\C--Users-svrub-Documents-Mis-cosillas-ProyectosPersonales-brainybuddy\\416e11ac-d3a1-4c4c-9497-3863ea40e4eb\\tool-results\\mcp-render-list_logs-1776945928755.txt"; $data = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path\); $needle = '\\"level\\": \\"ERROR\\"'; $pos=@\(\); $i=0; while \(\($i = $data.IndexOf\($needle, $i, [System.StringComparison]::Ordinal\)\) -ge 0\) { $pos += $i; $i++ }; foreach \($p in $pos\) { $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $p - 50\); $len = 250; if \($start + $len -gt $data.Length\) { $len = $data.Length - $start }; Write-Output "--- pos $p ---"; Write-Output $data.Substring\($start, $len\) })
